backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and booking request system with role-based access control (admin/user permissions), pagination, and random ID generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of the background image div from the HeroSection component with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, branding updates (Avsarvatika venue, +91 9119960204 contact), and architectural patterns.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using warm champagne/gold palette without blue/purple tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata for Avsarvatika marriage hall with branding image references.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, admin/public view modes, profile setup dialog, package selection, and rendering all page sections with proper routing.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin dashboard view for managing booking requests with pagination, displaying request details (name, contact, date, package) in cards with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component using Internet Identity that handles login/logout actions and manages query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: Controlled form component for booking requests with validation, BigInt handling for guests field, TypeScript types from backend interface, and success/error state management.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section showcasing venue features with four icon-based cards highlighting excellence, personalized service, trust, and premium quality.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section combining venue contact information (phone, email, address, hours) with WhatsApp quick contact button and embedded booking request form.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Facilities section displaying four categories of venue features (venue features, amenities, services, outdoor spaces) in a grid of cards with checkmark lists.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Displays a filterable image gallery with category buttons and a lightbox modal for viewing images with navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Renders a minimal hero section component with brand constants imported but no visible content.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Displays three pricing tiers (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with features, pricing, and WhatsApp inquiry buttons for each package.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Shows a grid of six customer testimonials with ratings, quotes, avatars, and event types for the marriage hall.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying brand logo, quick navigation links, contact information (address, phone, WhatsApp, email), and copyright notice with admin access link.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header component with responsive navigation menu (desktop and mobile sheet) that provides smooth scrolling to page sections.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports brand constants including name, tagline, contact information, and address for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile operations, admin checks, booking request submission, and paginated booking request retrieval.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm champagne/gold color palette for light and dark modes using CSS variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, typography, animations, and design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking one existing feature request to remove a background image div from the HeroSection component.
